general.title: General settings
general.description: Change the general settings of the application.

date-time.title: Date and Time settings
date-time.description: Configure the date and time format used in the application.

currency.title: Currency settings
currency.description: Configure the currency used in the application.
currency.label: Currency

language.title: Language settings
language.description: Configure the language used in the application.
language.label: Language

shame.title: Shelf of Shame settings
shame.description: Configure how the Shelf of Shame is calculated and displayed.

enabled.label: Enable Shelf of Shame
enabled.description: Track games that haven't been played in a while.

game-nights.title: Game Nights settings
game-nights.description: Configure how game nights are managed and displayed.

enabled.label: Enable Game Nights
enabled.description: Enable the game nights feature to plan and manage game night events with your friends.

rsvp-authentication.label: Require authentication for RSVPs
rsvp-authentication.description: When enabled, players will need to log in to RSVP for game nights. This adds an extra layer of security and helps prevent spam RSVPs.

version-track.label: Version track
version-track.description: Choose to stay on stable releases or switch to beta releases to get early access to new features.

beta.label: Beta
beta.description: Get beta releases with early access to new features.

updates.title: Update check settings
updates.description: Configure how the application checks for updates.

enabled.label: Enable update check
enabled.description: When enabled, the application will automatically check for and install updates.

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
password.min-length: Password must be at least 4 characters

create.title: Create New User
create.description: Fill out the form to create a new user.

temp-password.title: Temporary Password
temp-password.description: Password reset for "{{username}}". Save this password — it won't be shown again.

delete.title: Delete User
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{username}}"? This cannot be undone.

notifications.password-change-failed: Failed to change password. Check your current password.
